creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 181853
thunderbird and thunderbird-i18n, 52.0.1

attached patch updates thunderbird and thunderbird-i18n to 52.0.1. Update is rather trivial, passes poudriere and "works for me".

linux-thunderbird is still at 45.8.0 - I propose to set that DEPRECATED, as
I have neither the resources to test the changes under linux emulation (GTK3? pulseaudio?) nor do I believe many linux-only plugins to exist. (additionally, any dependencies on pulseaudio seem to get pushback lately, even if it "works for me"). If ok'd, I'll add the DEPRECATED line in a seperate commit.
